about.en: Tezos is a self-amending proof-of-stake blockchain with on-chain governance. XTZ is used for fees and staking.
about.es: Tezos es una blockchain de prueba de participación (proof-of-stake) autoenmendable con gobernanza (governance) on-chain (on-chain). XTZ se usa para comisiones y staking (staking).
about.ca: Tezos és una blockchain de prova de participació (proof-of-stake) autoesmenable amb governança (governance) on-chain (on-chain). XTZ s'utilitza per a comissions i staking (staking).
